results.name: alt_motifs_preference
results.description: Correlation between the preference for sequence A and the difference in alternating motifs (A - B), for equal length sequences.

results.name: rep_motifs_aversion
results.description: Correlation between the preference for sequence A and the difference in repeating motifs (B - A), for equal length sequences.

results.name: max_run_preference
results.description: Correlation between the preference for sequence A and the difference in maximum run lengths (B - A), for equal length sequences.

results.name: periodicity_aversion
results.description: Correlation between the preference for sequence A and the difference in periodicity (B - A), for equal length sequences.

results.name: extreme_alternation_slope
results.description: Correlation between preference for A and difference in alternation rate (B - A) when both sequences are highly alternating (p_alts > 0.6).

results.name: length_imbalance_interaction
results.description: Correlation between preference for A and length difference (A - B) when both sequences are highly imbalanced (imbalance > 0.25).

results.name: length_alternation_interaction
results.description: Correlation between preference for A and length difference (A - B) when both sequences are highly alternating (p_alts > 0.6).

results.name: length_preference_overall
results.description: Correlation between preference for A and length difference (A - B), capturing the main effect of length.
